positives: Support for Google Maps, YouTube Music and Google Wallet
positives_detail: The Charge 6 delivered accurate heart rate data throughout testing, demonstrating reliable sensor performance.
It supports Google Maps navigation, YouTube Music playback and Google Wallet payments on-device.

negatives_detail: The small screen can make some interactions feel cramped and harder to read.
It lacks advanced smart features found in more expensive smartwatches.

positives_detail: The 0.7-inch AMOLED display was bright and clear, improving visibility over previous models.
We found it lightweight and comfortable for continuous wear, weighing just 0.62 ounces.

negatives: Small screen won’t be for everyone

positives_detail: It offers robust health tracking features, including heart rate and workout monitoring.

positives: All sport modes now on device
